title: Mexico's Sheinbaum denies 'diplomatic crisis' with Spain after conquest row
summary_full: The Mexican president says there were never tension over Spainish colonisation, which had become a thorny issue.
summary_public: The Mexican president says there were never tension over Spainish colonisation, which had become a thorny issue.
